meta.description: Statement review follow-up with offer_angle:confirmed_savings_review and a $380 savings figure referenced in audience_context. Versions may reference the savings opportunity.

strategy.audience_context: Landscaping contractor. Review summary: analysis of statement identified approximately $380 in monthly unnecessary fees related to non-qualified surcharges. Savings opportunity confirmed. Calculated savings amount: $380/month.
strategy.pain_point_hypothesis: Non-qualified surcharges adding approximately $380/month in unnecessary fees.
strategy.trust_angle: Present the confirmed savings opportunity clearly and propose a call to act on it.
strategy.proof_point: Approximately $380/month in avoidable non-qualified surcharges identified in the review.
strategy.cta: Can we connect this week to walk through how to address this?
compliance_notes: Reference only the confirmed savings figure from the review
required_inclusions: Reference the $380 savings opportunity from the review
Propose a call to act on findings
strategy.reasoning: Confirmed savings figure present; offer_angle allows referencing the savings opportunity.

selected_skill_definitions.instructions: Reference actual review findings. Propose next step.
When offer_angle is confirmed_savings_review and a savings figure exists, referencing the savings opportunity is permitted.
Reference landscaping payment patterns where relevant.
Reference only confirmed figures from the review. Do not guarantee outcomes.

expected.expected_subject_behavior: Subjects may reference the savings opportunity; none use guaranteed language
expected.expected_body_behavior: May reference the $380 savings opportunity; versions do not use guaranteed language
expected.expected_cta_behavior: Each version invites a call or discussion about acting on the findings
expected.pass_fail_notes: With offer_angle:confirmed_savings_review and a $380 figure in audience_context, versions may reference the savings opportunity. Guarantee language remains forbidden.
